name: repo-standard-toolkit
description: Bootstraps and enforces enterprise repo hygiene in any codebase: scaffolds README / CHANGELOG / CONVENTIONS / CONTRIBUTING / CODE_OF_CONDUCT / SECURITY / LICENSE from published standards (Keep a Changelog, standard-readme, Contributor Covenant, SemVer), then installs a committed, dependency-free lint plus the CI gate that runs it, so the standard polices itself on every push — with or without Claude.
